subject: Mathematics
objective:
In this project, an attempt has been made to find some approximation to
the value of   π , using simple different methods.
d escripti O n
procedure:
Take a squared paper of dimension say 20 cm   ×   20 cm.   Draw a circle of
radius say 10 cm on it as shown in Fig. 4.
Count the number of vertices of the squares in the circles.   Let it be   a .
Divide   a   by   r 2  to get value of   π .
In this case,   π   =  317
10 2  =   317
100   =   3.17
As radius   r   increases, the value of   π   comes closer to 3.14.
discussion:
The ratio of the circumference and diameter of a circle is always constant
and is denoted by   π .   Its approximate value is 3.14.
